---
name: internal-comms
description: A set of resources to help write internal communications. Use whenever asked to write status reports, leadership updates, 3P updates, company newsletters, FAQs, incident reports, or project updates.
license: Complete terms in LICENSE.txt
---

## When to use this skill
To write internal communications.

## How to use this skill

1. Identify the communication type.
2. Load the appropriate guideline file from the `examples/` directory.
3. Follow the specific instructions in that file for formatting, tone, and content gathering.
